full_text:
Gao You 高誘
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gao You (高誘)was born in Zhou. Noted scholar and student of Lu Zhi, held a number of middle-range appointments under Cao Cao. Gao You was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
